_comment: Copy this to 'dune-connection.json' (same folder) and fill in YOUR server. dune-connection.json is git-ignored so your details never get committed. You can also create it from the GUI's 'Connect to Server' dialog. Only Host + (KeyPath or Password) are required; the rest are optional.
_optional: Optional. Namespace/Shards auto-detect if blank. JumpHost routes SSH through a bastion (ssh -J, key auth), e.g. "owner@gateway". BattlegroupBin / DashboardUrl only change on a non-standard install.
_db: Only needed for the Bases backup/restore feature (bases / base-export / base-import). DbPassword is the game Postgres password; DbUser/DbName/DbPort/DbPod default to postgres / dune / 15432 / auto-detect. Leave DbPassword blank to disable the base feature.
